Announcements

Faculty of Medicine

Announcements

Our student has been accepted to do summer internship at Heidelberg University Faculty of Medicine

11
						April

2023

Dilara Dursun,  3rd year student in medical faculty, has been accepted to do summer internship at Heidelberg University Faculty of Medicine, Department of Pediatric Metabolic Diseases, one of the most prestigious institutions in Germany. We congratulate our student and wish her continued success.  Deanery of the Faculty of Medicine.
